claims: This is a harness stability patch, not the final no-rescue proof.
It keeps the existing approved StartupFallback/runner model and adds no new persistence mechanism.
It patches command_inbox backlog processing for files that already exist before the watcher starts.
It routes safe autopilot-command-*.json files from 13_chatgpt_downloads to command_inbox.
It keeps the watcher process alive after blocked or failed command runs by returning to watch mode.
It adds internal pasteback retries around transient CDP/browser failures before blocking.
It preserves PASTEBACK_POSTED_TEXT_MATCH as the merge gate.
